title: Y2K4's Data Pack
description: A collection of all my data pack creations
body:
### A collection of all my data pack creations. More features to be added in the future! ---
Features List ### Current features - Fast Hopper (Transfers one item each game tick) ### Planned features - Fast Furnace (Smelts one item each game tick)
Crafting Recipes #### Fast Hopper *Craft in a Smithing Table with a hopper and a netherite ingot.*
